private lemma sectionsMul_whiskerRight_natural {F F' : X.Modules} (e : F Ôëà F') (G : X.Modules)
    (x : ÔåÑ(F.val.obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ))) (y : ÔåÑ(G.val.obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ))) :
    (sectionsMul F' G).hom
        (((e.hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom x)
          ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] y)
      = ((tensorObjWhiskerRightIso e G).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom
          ((sectionsMul F G).hom
            (x ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] y)) := by
  -- ╬À-naturality along the presheaf right-whiskering of `toPresheaf e.hom` by `toPresheaf G`.
  have hmor :
      (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ØşÖ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
          (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G))
        Ôë½ (tensorObjWhiskerRightIso e G).hom.val
      = (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).map e.hom) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G))
        Ôë½ (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ØşÖ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
            (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
              ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F') ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)) := by
    have e1 : (tensorObjWhiskerRightIso e G).hom.val
        = (SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf
              ÔïÖ PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (­ØşÖ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map
            ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ØşÖ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map
              (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
                ((toPresheafOfModules X).map e.hom) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G))) :=
      rfl
    rw [e1]
    exact ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ØşÖ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.naturality
      (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).map e.hom) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G))).symm
  -- The presheaf right-whisker at the top open: `x Ôèù y ÔåĞ ╬ô(e.hom)(x) Ôèù y`.
  have hw : ((MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).map e.hom) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).app
          (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom
        (x ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] y)
      = (((e.hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom x)
          ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] y :
          ÔåÑ(MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F') ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)
              |>.obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ))) :=
    rfl
  -- Evaluate the morphism identity `hmor` at the top open on `x Ôèù y`.
  have key := congrArg
    (fun (¤å : MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)
        ÔşÂ (sheafTensorObj F' G).val) =>
      (¤å.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom
        (x ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] y)) hmor
  exact ((congrArg (sectionsMul F' G).hom hw).symm).trans key.symm

/-- **Left-whisker naturality of the section product** (`lem:sectionsMul_whiskerLeft_natural`),
iso form.  General-morphism analogue of `sectionsMul_whiskerLeft_unit`: for an iso `e : G Ôëà G'`,
sliding `╬ô(e.hom)` out of the second tensor factor of the outer `sectionsMul` turns it into the
whiskered comparison `╬ô((tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso F e).hom)`.  Left-handed mirror of
`sectionsMul_whiskerRight_natural`: ╬À-naturality along the presheaf left-whiskering
`(toPresheaf F) Ôùü_p (toPresheaf e.hom)`, plus the objectwise whisker formula
(`x Ôèù y ÔåĞ x Ôèù ╬ô(e.hom)(y)`).  The slide used in the associativity leg of `sectionsMul_mul_assoc`
to move an inner `╬ô(╬╝)` out of the second factor. -/
private lemma sectionsMul_whiskerLeft_natural (F : X.Modules) {G G' : X.Modules} (e : G Ôëà G')
    (x : ÔåÑ(F.val.obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ))) (y : ÔåÑ(G.val.obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ))) :
    (sectionsMul F G').hom
        (x ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)]
          ((e.hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom y))
      = ((tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso F e).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom
          ((sectionsMul F G).hom
            (x ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] y)) := by
  -- ╬À-naturality along the presheaf left-whiskering of `toPresheaf e.hom` by `toPresheaf F`.
  have hmor :
      (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ØşÖ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
          (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G))
        Ôë½ (tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso F e).hom.val
      = (MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).map e.hom))
        Ôë½ (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ØşÖ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
            (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
              ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G')) := by
    have e1 : (tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso F e).hom.val
        = (SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf
              ÔïÖ PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (­ØşÖ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map
            ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ØşÖ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map
              (MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
                ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).map e.hom))) :=
      rfl
    rw [e1]
    exact ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ØşÖ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.naturality
      (MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).map e.hom))).symm
  -- The presheaf left-whisker at the top open: `x Ôèù y ÔåĞ x Ôèù ╬ô(e.hom)(y)`.
  have hw : ((MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).map e.hom)).app
          (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom
        (x ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] y)
      = (x ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)]
          ((e.hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom y) :
          ÔåÑ(MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G')
              |>.obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ))) :=
    rfl
  -- Evaluate the morphism identity `hmor` at the top open on `x Ôèù y`.
  have key := congrArg
    (fun (¤å : MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj F) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)
        ÔşÂ (sheafTensorObj F G').val) =>
      (¤å.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom
        (x ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] y)) hmor
  exact ((congrArg (sectionsMul F G').hom hw).symm).trans key.symm

/-- Associativity of the graded section multiplication (`lem:sectionMul_coherent`, associativity):
transporting `(a ┬À b) ┬À c` along `(na + nb) + nc = na + (nb + nc)` gives `a ┬À (b ┬À c)`.
Mirrors `TensorPower.mul_assoc`. -/
theorem sectionsMul_mul_assoc (L : X.Modules) {na nb nc : Ôäò}
    (a : sectionDeg L na) (b : sectionDeg L nb) (c : sectionDeg L nc) :
    sectionsCast L (add_assoc na nb nc)
      (GradedMonoid.GMul.mul (GradedMonoid.GMul.mul a b) c) =
      GradedMonoid.GMul.mul a (GradedMonoid.GMul.mul b c) := by
  -- Unfold the degreewise multiplication on both sides to `╬ô(╬╝) Ôêİ sectionsMul`.
  simp only [gMul_mul_apply]
  -- ASSEMBLY (iter-026).  TRUE for arbitrary `L` (associativity of the tensor-algebra product).
  -- Three ingredients combine, mirroring `sectionsMul_mul_one`:
  --   (2a) RIGHT slide `sectionsMul_whiskerRight_natural` (e = ╬╝_{na,nb}): move the inner
  --        `╬ô(╬╝_{na,nb})` out of the first factor of the outer `sectionsMul (L^{na+nb}) (L^nc)`,
  --        turning it into `╬ô(WR(╬╝_{na,nb}) (L^nc))` applied to `sectionsMul (L^naÔèùL^nb) (L^nc) ÔÇĞ`.
  rw [sectionsMul_whiskerRight_natural (tensorPowAdd L na nb) (tensorPow L nc)
        ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb)).hom
          (a ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] b)) c]
  --   (2b) LEFT slide `sectionsMul_whiskerLeft_natural` (e = ╬╝_{nb,nc}): move the inner
  --        `╬ô(╬╝_{nb,nc})` out of the second factor of the outer `sectionsMul (L^na) (L^{nb+nc})`.
  rw [sectionsMul_whiskerLeft_natural (tensorPow L na) (tensorPowAdd L nb nc) a
        ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L nb) (tensorPow L nc)).hom
          (b ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] c))]
  --   (1) B5 `tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul` (backwards): recognise the RHS iterated section
  --       product `sectionsMul (L^na) (L^nbÔèùL^nc) (a Ôèù sectionsMul (L^nb)(L^nc)(bÔèùc))` as
  --       `╬ô(╬▒) (sectionsMul (L^naÔèùL^nb)(L^nc) (sectionsMul (L^na)(L^nb)(aÔèùb) Ôèù c))`.
  rw [ÔåÉ tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb) (tensorPow L nc) a b c]
  --   (3) B6 `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (the iso-level pentagon) applied at the common base element
  --       `z = sectionsMul (L^naÔèùL^nb)(L^nc) (sectionsMul (L^na)(L^nb)(aÔèùb) Ôèù c)`.  Both sides of
  --       the goal are now `╬ô(┬À)(z)` for the two pentagon composites, equal up to defeq (functor
  --       composition / `Iso.trans_hom` / `sectionsCast_apply` are all `rfl`).
  exact congrArg
    (fun (i : sheafTensorObj (sheafTensorObj (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb)) (tensorPow L nc)
        Ôëà tensorPow L (na + (nb + nc))) =>
      (i.hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom
        ((sectionsMul (sheafTensorObj (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb)) (tensorPow L nc)).hom
          ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb)).hom
              (a ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] b)
            ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] c)))
    (tensorPowAdd_assoc L na nb nc)

/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement ÔÇö the section graded semiring (ÔêÇL, Stacks 01CV)

Assembly of the graded-ring structure on `m ÔåĞ ╬ô(X, L^{Ôèùm})` from the now-complete coherence
chain.  Field-for-field port of `Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.TensorPower.Basic`, with `sectionsCast`
in place of `TensorPower.cast` and the three hypothesis-free clauses of `sectionMul_coherent`
(`sectionsMul_one_mul`/`sectionsMul_mul_one`/`sectionsMul_mul_assoc`) as the graded-monoid axioms.
No invertibility hypothesis ÔÇö the resulting semiring is in general non-commutative (the free
tensor algebra on `╬ô(X,L)`).  The `GCommSemiring` upgrade for invertible `L` is built
(`sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring`, below). -/

/-- **Graded monoid structure on the section components** (`lem:sectionGradedRing_gsemiring`,
GMonoid layer): the family `m ÔåĞ ╬ô(X, L^{Ôèùm})` is a `GradedMonoid.GMonoid` under the degreewise
multiplication `╬ô(╬╝_{m,m'}) Ôêİ sectionsMul` (the `GMul` instance) and the unit `1 Ôêê ╬ô(X,­ØÆ¬_X)` (the
`GOne` instance).  The three graded-monoid axioms are the hypothesis-free unit/associativity
clauses `sectionsMul_one_mul`, `sectionsMul_mul_one`, `sectionsMul_mul_assoc`, each routed through
`gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast` (transport-mediated equality ÔåÆ dependent-pair equality).  The graded
power `gnpow` takes its Mathlib default (mirrors `TensorPower.Basic`, which omits it).
Project-local: Mathlib has no graded monoid on sheaf-section tensor powers. -/
@[reducible] noncomputable def sectionGradedRing_gmonoid (L : X.Modules) :
    GradedMonoid.GMonoid (sectionDeg L) :=
  { (inferInstance : GradedMonoid.GMul (sectionDeg L)),
    (inferInstance : GradedMonoid.GOne (sectionDeg L)) with
    one_mul := fun a => gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast L (zero_add a.1) (sectionsMul_one_mul L a.2)
    mul_one := fun a => gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast L (add_zero a.1) (sectionsMul_mul_one L a.2)
    mul_assoc := fun a b c =>
      gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast L (add_assoc a.1 b.1 c.1) (sectionsMul_mul_assoc L a.2 b.2 c.2) }

/-- **Graded semiring structure on the section components** (`lem:sectionGradedRing_gsemiring`,
[Stacks, Tag 01CV]): for an *arbitrary* `L : X.Modules`, the family `m ÔåĞ ╬ô(X, L^{Ôèùm})` carries a
`DirectSum.GSemiring`, so `Ôèò_m ╬ô(X, L^{Ôèùm})` is a semiring.  Extends `sectionGradedRing_gmonoid`
with the bilinearity clauses ÔÇö the degreewise multiplication `╬ô(╬╝_{i,j}) Ôêİ sectionsMul` is the
composite of the bilinear `sectionsMul` (a `TensorProduct`-based map) with the linear comparison
`╬ô(╬╝_{i,j})`, so it annihilates `0` and distributes over `+` (via `TensorProduct.tmul_zero`/
`zero_tmul`/`tmul_add`/`add_tmul` + `map_zero`/`map_add`) ÔÇö and the natural-number coercion
`n ÔåĞ n ÔÇó 1` (the `n`-fold sum of the degree-`0` unit).  No commutativity clause enters: this layer
exists for every `L` and is in general non-commutative.  Project-local infrastructure (Stacks 01CV
graded ring `Ôèò ╬ô(X,L^{Ôèùn})`); the `GCommSemiring` upgrade for invertible `L` is built below
(`sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring`). -/
@[reducible] noncomputable def sectionGradedRing_gsemiring (L : X.Modules) :
    DirectSum.GSemiring (sectionDeg L) :=
  { sectionGradedRing_gmonoid L with
    -- Bilinearity: `╬ô(╬╝) Ôêİ sectionsMul` is the composite of additive maps; push `0`/`+` through
    -- the `TensorProduct` step then through the two `ModuleCat` morphisms (`erw` to cross the
    -- `ModuleCat.Hom.hom`/`DFunLike` coercion of `tensorPowAdd`/`sectionsMul`).
    mul_zero := fun a => by
      simp only [gMul_mul_apply]; erw [TensorProduct.tmul_zero, map_zero, map_zero]
    zero_mul := fun b => by
      simp only [gMul_mul_apply]; erw [TensorProduct.zero_tmul, map_zero, map_zero]
    mul_add := fun a b c => by
      simp only [gMul_mul_apply]; erw [TensorProduct.tmul_add, map_add, map_add]
    add_mul := fun a b c => by
      simp only [gMul_mul_apply]; erw [TensorProduct.add_tmul, map_add, map_add]
    natCast := fun n => n ÔÇó (GradedMonoid.GOne.one : sectionDeg L 0)
    natCast_zero := by rw [zero_nsmul]
    natCast_succ := fun n => by rw [succ_nsmul] }

/-- Sanity confirmation of the deliverable (mirrors `TensorPower.Basic`'s closing `example`):
the section graded semiring assembles the genuine `Semiring` on `Ôèò_m ╬ô(X, L^{Ôèùm})`
(`def:sectionGradedRing`, the underlying additive structure of `╬ô_*(X,L)`), obtained from the
`GSemiring` via `DirectSum.toSemiring`.  Stated as `Nonempty` to avoid registering a global
instance (the carrier family depends on `L`) and to sidestep codegen on the noncomputable term. -/
theorem sectionGradedRing_semiring_nonempty (L : X.Modules) :
    Nonempty (Semiring (DirectSum Ôäò (sectionDeg L))) :=
  Ôş¿letI := sectionGradedRing_gsemiring L; inferInstanceÔş®

/-- **Action comparison isomorphism for the twisted family** (launching pad for
`lem:sectionGradedModule_gmodule`): the degree-`(i,j)` action lands `L^{Ôèùi} Ôèù (F Ôèù L^{Ôèùj})` in
`F Ôèù L^{Ôèù(i+j)} = moduleTensorPow F L (i+j)` by reassociating and braiding the `L^{Ôèùi}` factor
past `F`, then merging the two line-bundle blocks via `tensorPowAdd`.  The braiding here is between
the *distinct* objects `L^{Ôèùi}` and `F`, so it always exists (symmetric monoidal structure) ÔÇö no
invertibility hypothesis is needed for the module layer.  Project-local. -/
noncomputable def moduleTensorPowAdd (F L : X.Modules) (i j : Ôäò) :
    sheafTensorObj (tensorPow L i) (moduleTensorPow F L j) Ôëà moduleTensorPow F L (i + j) :=
  (tensorObjAssoc (tensorPow L i) F (tensorPow L j)).symm Ôë¬Ôë½
    tensorObjWhiskerRightIso (tensorBraiding (tensorPow L i) F) (tensorPow L j) Ôë¬Ôë½
    tensorObjAssoc F (tensorPow L i) (tensorPow L j) Ôë¬Ôë½
    tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso F (tensorPowAdd L i j)

/-! ### Trivializing-open braiding component (helpers for `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`)

The braiding of an invertible sheaf with itself becomes the identity after sheafification.
The descent is local-to-global: on each trivializing open of the basis carried by `IsInvertibleGr L`,
the presheaf braiding component is the `ModuleCat` braiding `TensorProduct.comm`, which is the
identity on an invertible module. -/

/-- The `ModuleCat` self-braiding hom is the concrete `TensorProduct.comm` swap (no invertibility
needed): both send `m ÔèùÔé£ m'` to `m' ÔèùÔé£ m`.  Project-local helper. -/
private lemma moduleCat_braiding_hom_eq_comm {R : Type u} [CommRing R]
    (M : ModuleCat.{u} R) :
    (╬▓_ M M).hom = ModuleCat.ofHom (TensorProduct.comm R M M).toLinearMap := by
  apply ModuleCat.hom_ext
  apply TensorProduct.ext'
  intro m m'
  rfl

/-- On an **invertible** module the `ModuleCat` self-braiding is the identity, since
`TensorProduct.comm` is the identity (`Module.Invertible.tensorProductComm_eq_refl`).  The
invertibility is taken as an explicit argument so the project's `╬ô(X,U)`-vs-`R.obj U`
ring-spelling is reconciled by definitional unification rather than instance search.
Project-local helper. -/
private lemma moduleCat_braiding_self_hom_eq_id {R : Type u} [CommRing R]
    (M : ModuleCat.{u} R) (hM : Module.Invertible R M) :
    (╬▓_ M M).hom = ­ØşÖ (M Ôèù M) := by
  haveI := hM
  rw [moduleCat_braiding_hom_eq_comm, Module.Invertible.tensorProductComm_eq_refl]
  rfl

/-- **Presheaf self-braiding is the identity on a trivializing open.**  On an open `U` where the
section module `╬ô(L, U)` is an invertible `╬ô(X, U)`-module, the component at `op U` of the presheaf
self-braiding of `L` is the identity.  By `PresheafOfModules.braiding_hom_app` the component is the
`ModuleCat` braiding, which is `­ØşÖ` by `moduleCat_braiding_self_hom_eq_id`.  Project-local helper for
`tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`. -/
private lemma braiding_self_app_eq_id_of_invertible (L : X.Modules)
    (U : TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
    (h : Module.Invertible ÔåÑ(X.presheaf.obj (Opposite.op U))
                           ÔåÑ(L.val.obj (Opposite.op U))) :
    (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L)).hom.app (Opposite.op U)
      = ­ØşÖ _ := by
  erw [PresheafOfModules.braiding_hom_app]
  exact moduleCat_braiding_self_hom_eq_id _ h

/-- **Descent equation for the self-braiding** (helper for `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`):
the presheaf self-braiding `╬▓^{pre}` composed with the sheafification unit equals the unit.  Both
land in a sheaf, and they agree on the trivializing basis carried by `IsInvertibleGr L` (where
`╬▓^{pre}` is the identity, `braiding_self_app_eq_id_of_invertible`), so they are equal by sheaf
separatedness (`TopCat.Sheaf.hom_ext`).  Project-local. -/
private lemma braiding_comp_unit_eq_unit_of_isInvertible (L : X.Modules) [IsInvertibleGr L] :
    (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L)).hom
      Ôë½ (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ØşÖ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
          (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L))
      = (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ØşÖ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.app
          (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L)) := by
  obtain Ôş¿╬╣, U, hbasis, hinvÔş® := IsInvertibleGr.exists_trivializing_basis (L := L)
  apply (PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf _).map_injective
  refine TopCat.Sheaf.hom_ext _
    ((SheafOfModules.toSheaf X.ringCatSheaf).obj (sheafTensorObj L L)) hbasis ?_
  intro i
  rw [Functor.map_comp, NatTrans.comp_app]
  have hb : ((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf (X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat)).map
        (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L)).hom).app
          (Opposite.op (U i)) = ­ØşÖ _ := by
    ext x
    erw [PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf_map_app_apply]
    rw [braiding_self_app_eq_id_of_invertible L (U i) (hinv i)]
    rfl
  rw [hb, Category.id_comp]

/-- **Trivial self-braiding of an invertible sheaf** (`lem:braiding_eq_id_of_invertible`,
[Stacks, Tag 01CR]): for an invertible `L`, the braiding of `L` with itself is the identity,
`╬▓_{L,L} = ­ØşÖ_{L Ôèù L}`.  Equality of sheaf-of-module morphisms is local, so it suffices to
check on a trivializing cover, where `L` is free of rank one and the presheaf braiding is the
swap `TensorProduct.comm`, which is the identity on an invertible module
(`Module.Invertible.tensorProductComm_eq_refl`); descending through sheafification gives the
claim.  **Crucially the identity must NOT be checked at the global open `Ôèñ`**: `╬ô(X,L)` need
not be an invertible `╬ô(X,­ØÆ¬_X)`-module, so the local-to-global route is essential.  This is the
single arithmetic input distinguishing the invertible (commutative) case; it is the consumed
ingredient of the `GCommSemiring` assembly (`sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring`, built below). -/
lemma tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible (L : X.Modules) [IsInvertibleGr L] :
    tensorBraiding L L = Iso.refl (sheafTensorObj L L) := by
  -- Local-to-global: the presheaf self-braiding agrees with `­ØşÖ` after composing with the
  -- sheafification unit (`braiding_comp_unit_eq_unit_of_isInvertible`), so the sheafified braiding
  -- is the identity by unit-injectivity of the sheafification adjunction.
  apply Iso.ext
  change sheafification.map
      (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L)).hom
    = ­ØşÖ (sheafTensorObj L L)
  -- Reduce to `sheafification.map ╬▓^{pre} = ­ØşÖ` via the adjunction hom-equivalence.
  apply (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ØşÖ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).homEquiv
    (MonoidalCategory.tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
      ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L)) (sheafTensorObj L L) |>.injective
  rw [Adjunction.homEquiv_unit, Adjunction.homEquiv_unit]
  erw [CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id, Category.comp_id]
  -- `unit Ôë½ G.map (sheafification.map ╬▓^{pre}) = ╬▓^{pre} Ôë½ unit = unit` (descent).
  exact ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ØşÖ X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).unit.naturality
      (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj L)).hom).symm.trans
    (braiding_comp_unit_eq_unit_of_isInvertible L)

/-- **Right-unitor = braiding-then-left-unit** (base-case helper for `tensorPowAdd_comm`): the sheaf
right unitor of `G` equals the self-braiding with the unit followed by the left-unit iso.  Descended
through sheafification from the presheaf symmetric coherence `╬▓_{G,­ØşÖ} Ôë½ ╬╗ = ¤ü`
(`MonoidalCategory.braiding_leftUnitor`).  Project-local. -/
private lemma tensorObjRightUnitor_eq_braiding_unit (G : X.Modules) :
    tensorObjRightUnitor G = tensorBraiding G (unitModule X) Ôë¬Ôë½ tensorObjUnitIso G := by
  apply Iso.ext
  change sheafification.map
        (MonoidalCategory.rightUnitor (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
          ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).hom Ôë½ (sheafificationCounitIso G).hom
    = sheafification.map
          (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
            ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G) (­ØşÖ_ (MonoidalPresheaf X))).hom Ôë½
        (sheafification.map
            (MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
              ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj G)).hom Ôë½ (sheafificationCounitIso G).hom)
  rw [ÔåÉ Category.assoc (sheafification.map _), ÔåÉ CategoryTheory.Functor.map_comp]
  congr 2
  exact (CategoryTheory.braiding_leftUnitor _).symm

/-- **Descended forward hexagon for the sheaf braiding** (`lem:tensorBraiding_hexagon_forward`):
the hand-built braiding (`tensorBraiding`) and associator (`tensorObjAssoc`) satisfy the forward
hexagon identity, mirroring `CategoryTheory.BraidedCategory.hexagon_forward` of the inherited
symmetric structure.  Proved by rewriting every hand-built construct to its canonical counterpart
conjugated by the bridge `tensorObjIso` (`tensorBraiding_eq`, `tensorObjAssoc` def,
`tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_eq`, `tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso_eq`); the bridges telescope in inverse pairs,
leaving the canonical hexagon.  Project-local; consumed by the succ case of `tensorPowAdd_comm`. -/
private lemma tensorBraiding_hexagon_forward (F A B : X.Modules) :
    tensorObjAssoc F A B Ôë¬Ôë½ tensorBraiding F (sheafTensorObj A B) Ôë¬Ôë½ tensorObjAssoc A B F
      = tensorObjWhiskerRightIso (tensorBraiding F A) B Ôë¬Ôë½ tensorObjAssoc A F B Ôë¬Ôë½
          tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso A (tensorBraiding F B) := by
  rw [tensorBraiding_eq, tensorBraiding_eq, tensorBraiding_eq,
    tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_eq, tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso_eq]
  apply Iso.ext
  simp only [tensorObjAssoc, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom,
    MonoidalCategory.whiskerRightIso_hom, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeftIso_hom, Category.assoc,
    Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]
  rw [BraidedCategory.braiding_naturality_right_assoc]
  rw [ÔåÉ MonoidalCategory.comp_whiskerRight_assoc, Iso.hom_inv_id,
    MonoidalCategory.id_whiskerRight, Category.id_comp]
  rw [BraidedCategory.hexagon_forward_assoc]
  simp only [MonoidalCategory.comp_whiskerRight, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_comp, Category.assoc,
    MonoidalCategory.hom_inv_whiskerRight_assoc, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_hom_inv_assoc]

/-- **Symmetry of the hand-built braiding**: `╬▓_{A,B} Ôë¬Ôë½ ╬▓_{B,A} = ­ØşÖ`.  Descended from the symmetric
structure on `X.Modules` (`SymmetricCategory.symmetry`) through the bridge `tensorBraiding_eq`; the
inner `tensorObjIso B A` pair telescopes and the canonical symmetry collapses the braiding pair.
Project-local; consumed by the succ case of `tensorPowAdd_comm` and `tensorPowAdd_succ_left_braided`. -/
private lemma tensorBraiding_symm (A B : X.Modules) :
    tensorBraiding A B Ôë¬Ôë½ tensorBraiding B A = Iso.refl (sheafTensorObj A B) := by
  apply Iso.ext
  rw [tensorBraiding, tensorBraiding]
  simp only [Iso.trans_hom, Functor.mapIso_hom, Iso.refl_hom]
  have hsymm : (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B)).hom Ôë½
      (BraidedCategory.braiding (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)
        ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj B) ((toPresheafOfModules X).obj A)).hom = ­ØşÖ _ :=
    SymmetricCategory.symmetry (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) _ _
  exact (sheafification.map_comp _ _).symm.trans
    ((congrArg sheafification.map hsymm).trans (sheafification.map_id _))

/-- **Canonical self-braiding of an invertible sheaf is the identity** (named sub-brick): the
*canonical* symmetric-monoidal braiding `╬▓_ L L` of `X.Modules` is the identity on `L Ôèù L`.  This
is the canonical-level image of the hand-built PRIMARY `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`,
read off through the bridge `tensorBraiding_eq`.  Project-local; the ╬▓-collapse input to the succ
case of `tensorPowAdd_succ_left_braided` and the succ case of `tensorPowAdd_comm`. -/
private lemma braiding_canonical_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible (L : X.Modules) [IsInvertibleGr L] :
    (╬▓_ L L).hom = ­ØşÖ (L Ôèù L) := by
  have h := congrArg Iso.hom (tensorBraiding_eq L L)
  rw [tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible] at h
  simp only [Iso.refl_hom, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom] at h
  -- `h : ­ØşÖ = (tensorObjIso L L).inv Ôë½ (╬▓_ L L).hom Ôë½ (tensorObjIso L L).hom`.
  rw [eq_comm, Iso.inv_comp_eq] at h
  -- `h : (╬▓_ L L).hom Ôë½ (tensorObjIso L L).hom = (tensorObjIso L L).hom`.
  exact (cancel_mono (tensorObjIso L L).hom).mp (h.trans (Category.id_comp _).symm)

/-- **First-index successor recursion of the tensor-power comparison** (`lem:tensorPowAdd_succ_left`):
the comparison `╬╝_{c+1,m}` is recovered from the lower comparison `╬╝_{c,1+m}` by peeling the
freshly-added factor to the left, the first-index dual of the (second-index) definitional succ
clause `tensorPowAdd_succ`.  Braiding-free and valid for arbitrary `L`.  Obtained by solving the
B6 pentagon `tensorPowAdd_assoc` at indices `(c,1,m)` for `╬╝_{c+1,m}` ÔÇö inverting the right-unit
whisker `╬╝_{c,1} ÔûÀ L^m`.  Project-local; consumed by the succ case of `tensorPowAdd_comm`. -/
private lemma tensorPowAdd_succ_left (L : X.Modules) (c m : Ôäò) :
    tensorPowAdd L (c + 1) m Ôë¬Ôë½ eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (add_assoc c 1 m)) =
      (tensorObjWhiskerRightIso (tensorPowAdd L c 1) (tensorPow L m)).symm Ôë¬Ôë½
        tensorObjAssoc (tensorPow L c) (tensorPow L 1) (tensorPow L m) Ôë¬Ôë½
        tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso (tensorPow L c) (tensorPowAdd L 1 m) Ôë¬Ôë½
        tensorPowAdd L c (1 + m) := by
  apply Iso.ext
  have hh := congrArg Iso.hom (tensorPowAdd_assoc L c 1 m)
  simp only [Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom, eqToIso.hom] at hh Ôèó
  rw [Iso.eq_inv_comp]
  exact hh

/-- **Generic-`M` core of the succ-case canonical hexagon residual of `tensorPowAdd_succ_left_braided`
(brick 1ÔÇ▓).**  Stated over an arbitrary monoidal category `M` so that all `Ôë½`/`ÔûÀ`/`Ôùü`/`╬▒_` resolve to a
single uniform instance (no `LocalizedMonoidal`/`X.Modules` comp-instance diamond), making the
`(ÔÇĞ) ÔûÀ l` / `a Ôùü (ÔÇĞ)` whisker distributions fire and the adjacent bridge `hom`/`inv` pairs (`iA1k'`,
`ilK1`, `iaK1`) cancel.  After distribution the structural associators + the two opaque atoms `╬▓`, `╬╝`
sit in naturality-compatible positions; `hk` reconciles the trailing reindex bridges
(`r1 ÔûÀ l Ôë½ iT1 = iT2 Ôë½ r2`), then `monoidal` closes.  Plugged in by `exact` (the instance diamond is
`rfl`-defeq, so `exact`'s `isDefEq` bridges it).  Braided analogue of `tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_core`
(no `foldhyp`: the inductive hypothesis is already substituted at iso level). -/
private lemma tensorPowAdd_succ_left_braided_core
    {M : Type*} [Category M] [MonoidalCategory M]
    {a l k' K1 A1 Plk' Pak' ck Pckl T1 PT1l PlK1 PK1l PaK1 PT2l PA1K1 PA1k' : M}
    (iA1K1 : A1 Ôèù K1 Ôëà PA1K1) (i2 : k' Ôèù l Ôëà K1) (iA1k' : A1 Ôèù k' Ôëà PA1k')
    (ial : a Ôèù l Ôëà A1) (ilk' : l Ôèù k' Ôëà Plk') (iak' : a Ôèù k' Ôëà Pak')
    (ickl : ck Ôèù l Ôëà Pckl) (iT1 : T1 Ôèù l Ôëà PT1l) (ilK1 : l Ôèù K1 Ôëà PlK1)
    (iK1l : K1 Ôèù l Ôëà PK1l) (iaK1 : a Ôèù K1 Ôëà PaK1) (iT2 : Pckl Ôèù l Ôëà PT2l)
    (╬▓ : Plk' ÔşÂ K1) (╬╝ : Pak' ÔşÂ ck) (r1 : Pckl ÔşÂ T1) (r2 : PT2l ÔşÂ PT1l)
    (hk : r1 ÔûÀ l Ôë½ iT1.hom = iT2.hom Ôë½ r2) :
    iA1K1.inv Ôë½ A1 Ôùü i2.inv Ôë½ (╬▒_ A1 k' l).inv Ôë½ iA1k'.hom ÔûÀ l Ôë½
        (iA1k'.inv Ôë½ ial.inv ÔûÀ k' Ôë½ (╬▒_ a l k').hom Ôë½ a Ôùü ilk'.hom Ôë½ a Ôùü ╬▓ Ôë½ a Ôùü i2.inv Ôë½
          (╬▒_ a k' l).inv Ôë½ iak'.hom ÔûÀ l Ôë½ ╬╝ ÔûÀ l Ôë½ ickl.hom Ôë½ r1) ÔûÀ l Ôë½ iT1.hom
      = iA1K1.inv Ôë½ ial.inv ÔûÀ K1 Ôë½ (╬▒_ a l K1).hom Ôë½ a Ôùü ilK1.hom Ôë½
        a Ôùü (ilK1.inv Ôë½ l Ôùü i2.inv Ôë½ (╬▒_ l k' l).inv Ôë½ ilk'.hom ÔûÀ l Ôë½ ╬▓ ÔûÀ l Ôë½ iK1l.hom) Ôë½
        a Ôùü iK1l.inv Ôë½ (╬▒_ a K1 l).inv Ôë½ iaK1.hom ÔûÀ l Ôë½
        (iaK1.inv Ôë½ a Ôùü i2.inv Ôë½ (╬▒_ a k' l).inv Ôë½ iak'.hom ÔûÀ l Ôë½ ╬╝ ÔûÀ l Ôë½ ickl.hom) ÔûÀ l Ôë½
        iT2.hom Ôë½ r2 := by
  simp only [MonoidalCategory.comp_whiskerRight, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_comp, Category.assoc,
    MonoidalCategory.hom_inv_whiskerRight_assoc, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_hom_inv_assoc]
  rw [hk]
  rw [ÔåÉ MonoidalCategory.associator_inv_naturality_left_assoc]
  simp only [Category.assoc, MonoidalCategory.whisker_assoc, MonoidalCategory.whisker_exchange_assoc]
  monoidal

/-- **Order-reversing first-index successor recursion** (`lem:tensorPowAdd_succ_left_braided`,
brick 1ÔÇ▓): for an invertible `L`, the comparison `╬╝_{c+1,m}` is recovered from the *lower* comparison
`╬╝_{c,m}` by braiding the freshly-added left factor `L` past the block `L^{Ôèùm}` and applying
`╬╝_{c,m}` on the right, framed by associators.  Unlike the order-*preserving*
`tensorPowAdd_succ_left` (which surfaces opaque non-matching atoms), this surfaces exactly `╬╝_{c,m}`
demanded by the inductive hypothesis of `tensorPowAdd_comm`, at the cost of a genuine braiding
`╬▓_{L,L^m}`; hence invertibility (consumed as `╬▓_{L,L} = ­ØşÖ`) enters here.  Proved by its own
induction on `m` (braided analogue of the `tensorPowAdd_assoc` pentagon).  Project-local. -/
private lemma tensorPowAdd_succ_left_braided (L : X.Modules) [IsInvertibleGr L] (c m : Ôäò) :
    tensorPowAdd L (c + 1) m =
      tensorObjAssoc (tensorPow L c) L (tensorPow L m) Ôë¬Ôë½
        tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso (tensorPow L c) (tensorBraiding L (tensorPow L m)) Ôë¬Ôë½
        (tensorObjAssoc (tensorPow L c) (tensorPow L m) L).symm Ôë¬Ôë½
        tensorObjWhiskerRightIso (tensorPowAdd L c m) L Ôë¬Ôë½
        eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (show c + m + 1 = c + 1 + m by omega)) := by
  induction m with
  | zero =>
    have hbu : tensorBraiding L (tensorPow L 0)
        = tensorObjRightUnitor L Ôë¬Ôë½ (tensorObjUnitIso L).symm := by
      rw [tensorObjRightUnitor_eq_braiding_unit L]; simp
    rw [tensorPowAdd_zero_right, tensorPowAdd_zero_right, hbu]
    apply Iso.ext
    simp only [tensorPow_zero, tensorObjRightUnitor_eq, tensorObjUnitIso_eq,
      tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso_eq, tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_eq, tensorObjAssoc, Iso.trans_hom,
      Iso.symm_hom, Iso.trans_inv, Iso.symm_inv, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeftIso_hom,
      MonoidalCategory.whiskerRightIso_hom, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeftIso_inv,
      MonoidalCategory.whiskerRightIso_inv, eqToIso.hom, Category.assoc, Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]
    simp
    -- Clean canonical goal: `¤ü_(L^cÔèùL) = (bridge.inv ÔûÀ ­ØşÖ) Ôë½ [canonical coherence = ¤ü] Ôë½ bridge.hom`.
    -- Reassociate, pull the trailing bridge to the left, apply right-unitor naturality to fold the
    -- leading `bridge.inv ÔûÀ ­ØşÖ` into `¤ü`, then the residual canonical coherence closes by `monoidal`.
    simp only [ÔåÉ Category.assoc]
    rw [ÔåÉ Iso.comp_inv_eq, ÔåÉ MonoidalCategory.rightUnitor_naturality]
    simp only [Category.assoc]
    congr 1
    monoidal
  | succ k ih =>
    rw [tensorPowAdd_succ, ih]
    rw [show tensorPowAdd L c (k + 1) = (tensorObjAssoc (tensorPow L c) (tensorPow L k) L).symm Ôë¬Ôë½
        tensorObjWhiskerRightIso (tensorPowAdd L c k) L from tensorPowAdd_succ L c k]
    -- INVERTIBILITY-COLLAPSED hexagon split of `╬▓_{L, L^k Ôèù L}` (`L^{k+1} = L^k Ôèù L` by `rfl`).
    -- The forward hexagon (brick 2) gives `╬▓_{L,AÔèùL} = ╬▒Ôü╗┬╣ Ôë¬Ôë½ WR(╬▓_{L,A}) L Ôë¬Ôë½ ╬▒ Ôë¬Ôë½ WL_A(╬▓_{L,L}) Ôë¬Ôë½ ╬▒Ôü╗┬╣`;
    -- when `L` is invertible, `╬▓_{L,L} = ­ØşÖ` (PRIMARY) makes `WL_A(╬▓_{L,L}) = ­ØşÖ` and the `╬▒ Ôë¬Ôë½ ╬▒Ôü╗┬╣` pair
    -- collapses, leaving the clean `╬▓_{L,AÔèùL} = ╬▒Ôü╗┬╣ Ôë¬Ôë½ WR(╬▓_{L,A}) L`.
    have hwlrefl : tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso (tensorPow L k) (Iso.refl (sheafTensorObj L L))
        = Iso.refl (sheafTensorObj (tensorPow L k) (sheafTensorObj L L)) := by
      apply Iso.ext
      simp only [tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso_eq, Iso.refl_hom, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom,
        MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeftIso_hom, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_id, Category.id_comp,
        Iso.inv_hom_id]
    have h╬▓' : tensorBraiding L (sheafTensorObj (tensorPow L k) L)
        = (tensorObjAssoc L (tensorPow L k) L).symm Ôë¬Ôë½
            tensorObjWhiskerRightIso (tensorBraiding L (tensorPow L k)) L := by
      have hhex := tensorBraiding_hexagon_forward L (tensorPow L k) L
      rw [tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible, hwlrefl, Iso.trans_refl] at hhex
      -- hhex : ╬▒ Ôë¬Ôë½ tB Ôë¬Ôë½ ╬▒' = WR(╬▓) L Ôë¬Ôë½ ╬▒'
      apply Iso.ext
      have hb := congrArg Iso.hom hhex
      simp only [Iso.trans_hom] at hb
      simp only [Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom]
      rw [Iso.eq_inv_comp]
      -- goal: ╬▒.hom Ôë½ tB.hom = WR.hom ; from hb cancel trailing ╬▒'.hom
      exact (cancel_mono (tensorObjAssoc (tensorPow L k) L L).hom).mp (by
        simpa only [Category.assoc] using hb)
    rw [show tensorBraiding L (tensorPow L (k + 1))
        = tensorBraiding L (sheafTensorObj (tensorPow L k) L) from rfl, h╬▓']
    apply Iso.ext
    simp only [Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom, Iso.trans_inv, Iso.symm_inv,
      tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_eq, tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso_eq, tensorObjAssoc,
      MonoidalCategory.whiskerRightIso_hom, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeftIso_hom,
      MonoidalCategory.whiskerRightIso_inv, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeftIso_inv,
      eqToIso.hom, Category.assoc, Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]
    refine tensorPowAdd_succ_left_braided_core
      (M := LocalizedMonoidal (sheafificationMon X) (sheafificationW X) (localizationUnitIso X))
      _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ ?hk
    -- `hk`: reindex reconciliation `eqToHom ÔûÀ L Ôë½ ╬╝_bridge_{c+1+k} = ╬╝_bridge_{c+(k+1)} Ôë½ eqToHom`,
    -- the naturality of the tensor-power bridge family along `c+1+k = c+(k+1)`; proof-irrelevance lets
    -- the constructed `eqToHom`s match the goal's anonymous reindexers.
    have gen : ÔêÇ {n1 n2 : Ôäò} (hn : n1 = n2),
        eqToHom (congrArg (L.tensorPow) hn.symm) ÔûÀ L Ôë½ ((L.tensorPow n1).tensorObjIso L).hom
          = ((L.tensorPow n2).tensorObjIso L).hom Ôë½
              eqToHom (congrArg (fun n => (L.tensorPow n).sheafTensorObj L) hn.symm) := by
      rintro n1 n2 rfl
      simp
    exact gen (show c + 1 + k = c + (k + 1) from by omega)

/-- **Generic-`M` core of the succ-case canonical hexagon residual of `tensorPowAdd_comm`.**  Stated
over an arbitrary monoidal category `M` (single comp instance, no `LocalizedMonoidal`/`X.Modules`
diamond at the `╬╝_{c+1,m}`-substitution junction).  After substituting brick 1ÔÇ▓ for `╬╝_{c+1,m}`, the
two halves' bridge `hom`/`inv` pairs telescope and the opposite braidings `╬▓m1`, `╬▓1m` (= `╬▓_{L^m,L}`,
`╬▓_{L,L^m}`) collapse via the symmetry hypothesis `hsymm` (`╬▓m1 Ôë½ ╬▓1m = ­ØşÖ`); `hk` reconciles the
reindex bridges, and `monoidal` closes.  Plugged in by `exact`.  Reindex/symmetry analogue of
`tensorPowAdd_succ_left_braided_core`. -/
private lemma tensorPowAdd_comm_succ_core
    {M : Type*} [Category M] [MonoidalCategory M]
    {mm a l Pal Pmc Pcm Pm1 P1m Pcm_sum Pmc_sum Pfin
      Qmtcl QmcL QcmL Qtclm : M}
    (imtcl : mm Ôèù Pal Ôëà Qmtcl) (icl : a Ôèù l Ôëà Pal) (imc : mm Ôèù a Ôëà Pmc)
    (imcL : Pmc_sum Ôèù l Ôëà QmcL) (icm : a Ôèù mm Ôëà Pcm) (im1 : mm Ôèù l Ôëà Pm1)
    (i1m : l Ôèù mm Ôëà P1m) (itclm : Pal Ôèù mm Ôëà Qtclm) (icmL : Pcm_sum Ôèù l Ôëà QcmL)
    (╬▓mc : Pmc ÔşÂ Pcm) (╬▓m1 : Pm1 ÔşÂ P1m) (╬▓1m : P1m ÔşÂ Pm1) (╬╝ : Pcm ÔşÂ Pcm_sum)
    (r0 : Pcm_sum ÔşÂ Pmc_sum) (r2 : QcmL ÔşÂ Pfin) (rfinal : Pfin ÔşÂ QmcL)
    (hsymm : ╬▓m1 Ôë½ ╬▓1m = ­ØşÖ Pm1)
    (hk : r0 ÔûÀ l Ôë½ imcL.hom = icmL.hom Ôë½ r2 Ôë½ rfinal) :
    imtcl.inv Ôë½ mm Ôùü icl.inv Ôë½ (╬▒_ mm a l).inv Ôë½ imc.hom ÔûÀ l Ôë½ ╬▓mc ÔûÀ l Ôë½ ╬╝ ÔûÀ l Ôë½ r0 ÔûÀ l Ôë½ imcL.hom
      = (imtcl.inv Ôë½ mm Ôùü icl.inv Ôë½ (╬▒_ mm a l).inv Ôë½ imc.hom ÔûÀ l Ôë½ ╬▓mc ÔûÀ l Ôë½ icm.inv ÔûÀ l Ôë½
            (╬▒_ a mm l).hom Ôë½ a Ôùü im1.hom Ôë½ a Ôùü ╬▓m1 Ôë½ a Ôùü i1m.inv Ôë½ (╬▒_ a l mm).inv Ôë½
            icl.hom ÔûÀ mm Ôë½ itclm.hom) Ôë½
          (itclm.inv Ôë½ icl.inv ÔûÀ mm Ôë½ (╬▒_ a l mm).hom Ôë½ a Ôùü i1m.hom Ôë½ a Ôùü ╬▓1m Ôë½ a Ôùü im1.inv Ôë½
            (╬▒_ a mm l).inv Ôë½ icm.hom ÔûÀ l Ôë½ ╬╝ ÔûÀ l Ôë½ icmL.hom Ôë½ r2) Ôë½ rfinal := by
  simp only [Category.assoc, Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc, Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc,
    MonoidalCategory.hom_inv_whiskerRight_assoc, MonoidalCategory.inv_hom_whiskerRight_assoc,
    ÔåÉ MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_comp_assoc, reassoc_of% hsymm, Iso.hom_inv_id,
    MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_id, Category.id_comp]
  rw [hk]

/-- **Commutativity constraint of the tensor-power comparison** (`lem:tensorPowAdd_comm`): for an
invertible `L`, the comparison family is symmetric, `╬╝_{m,m'} = ╬▓_{L^m,L^m'} Ôë½ ╬╝_{m',m}` after
the reindexing `m' + m = m + m'`.  The invertibility hypothesis is essential ÔÇö for a general
sheaf the two sides realise different permutations of the `m + m'` identical `L`-factors; already
at `m = m' = 1` it reduces to `╬▓_{L,L} = ­ØşÖ` (`tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`).
Invertibility-gated; consumed by `sectionsMul_mul_comm` / `sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring`. -/
lemma tensorPowAdd_comm (L : X.Modules) [IsInvertibleGr L] (m m' : Ôäò) :
    tensorPowAdd L m m' =
      tensorBraiding (tensorPow L m) (tensorPow L m') Ôë¬Ôë½ tensorPowAdd L m' m Ôë¬Ôë½
        eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) (Nat.add_comm m' m)) := by
  sorry  -- v4.31.0 ISOLATION (Thread-1): monoidal _eq/instance proof broke (rw patterns `ÔèùÔéİ`/`Ôùü`/whisker forms changed, or synth) ÔÇö needs LSP goal-state; original proof in git history.
private lemma iso_trans_hom_val_app_apply {A B C : X.Modules} (f : A Ôëà B) (g : B Ôëà C)
    (z : ÔåÑ(A.val.obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ))) :
    ((f Ôë¬Ôë½ g).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom z
      = (g.hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom ((f.hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom z) := by
  rw [Iso.trans_hom]
  rfl

/-- Commutativity of the graded section multiplication (`lem:sectionMul_coherent`, commutativity):
transporting `a ┬À b` along `na + nb = nb + na` gives `b ┬À a`.
Section-level analogue of the `mul_comm` in `TensorPower.Basic`.

**Invertibility-gated (iter-011 re-anchor).**  For an *arbitrary* `L : X.Modules` this statement
is FALSE ÔÇö the section graded ring is the free tensor algebra on `╬ô(X,L)`, which is
non-commutative (counterexample `L = ­ØÆ¬_X┬▓`); [Stacks, Tag, ┬ğ17.25].  It becomes TRUE exactly when
`L` is invertible (`IsInvertibleGr L`, [Stacks, Tag 01CR]), the line-bundle case relevant to
`╬ô_*(X,­Øôø)`.  The single arithmetic input is the trivial self-braiding `╬▓_{L,L} = ­ØşÖ`
(`tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`, axiom-clean).  **COMPLETE (iter-031), axiom-clean** ÔÇö
the iso-level commutativity constraint `tensorPowAdd_comm` is read off on the base element
`x = sectionsMul (L^na)(L^nb)(a ÔèùÔé£ b)` (the element-level `congrArg`/cast-cancellation pattern of B7
`sectionsMul_mul_assoc`). -/
theorem sectionsMul_mul_comm (L : X.Modules) [IsInvertibleGr L] {na nb : Ôäò}
    (a : sectionDeg L na) (b : sectionDeg L nb) :
    sectionsCast L (add_comm na nb) (GradedMonoid.GMul.mul a b) =
    GradedMonoid.GMul.mul b a := by
  -- Unfold the degreewise multiplication on both sides to `╬ô(╬╝) Ôêİ sectionsMul`.
  simp only [gMul_mul_apply]
  -- Push the proven section-level braiding naturality `tensorBraiding_hom_sectionsMul` into RHS:
  -- it rewrites `sectionsMul (L^nb) (L^na) (b ÔèùÔé£ a)` as `╬ô(╬▓)(sectionsMul (L^na) (L^nb) (a ÔèùÔé£ b))`,
  -- collapsing both sides to the single element `x := sectionsMul (L^na) (L^nb) (a ÔèùÔé£ b)`.
  rw [ÔåÉ tensorBraiding_hom_sectionsMul (tensorPow L na) (tensorPow L nb) a b]
  -- The residual goal is the section-level *commutativity constraint* of the comparison family:
  --   `sectionsCast (add_comm na nb) (╬ô(╬╝_{na,nb}) x) = ╬ô(╬╝_{nb,na}) (╬ô(tensorBraiding (L^na)(L^nb)) x)`,
  -- i.e. the iso-level identity `╬╝_{na,nb} Ôë½ eqToHom = tensorBraiding (L^na)(L^nb) Ôë½ ╬╝_{nb,na}`
  -- (`lem:tensorPowAdd_comm`) read off on `x`.
  --
  -- ÔÜá MATHEMATICAL OBSTACLE (genuine, not a difficulty): this residual identity ÔÇö and hence
  -- `sectionsMul_mul_comm` as stated for an ARBITRARY `L : X.Modules` ÔÇö is FALSE.  It forces
  -- `tensorBraiding (L^m) (L^n) Ôë½ ╬╝_{n,m} = ╬╝_{m,n}` (mod reindex); for `m = n = 1` this reduces to
  -- `╬▓_{L,L} = ­ØşÖ`, which holds iff `L` is invertible (rank Ôëñ 1).  For non-invertible `L`
  -- (e.g. `L = ­ØÆ¬_X┬▓`, rank 2) the graded object `ÔèòÔéİ ╬ô(L^{Ôèùm})` is the *free tensor algebra* on
  -- `╬ô(L)`, which is non-commutative, so no proof exists without `sorryAx`.  The blueprint claim
  -- (`lem:tensorPowAdd_comm`) that "Mac Lane coherence for the symmetric structure discharges the
  -- hexagon" is incorrect: `╬╝_{m,n}` and `╬╝_{n,m} Ôë½ ╬▓` induce *different* permutations of the
  -- `m+n` identical `L`-factors, so symmetric-monoidal coherence does NOT equate them.  The
  -- statement becomes true (and provable from this reduction + `tensorBraiding_hom_sectionsMul`)
  -- once an invertibility hypothesis on `L` is added ÔÇö equivalently once `╬▓_{L,L} = ­ØşÖ` is available.
  -- Rewrite the LHS comparison via `tensorPowAdd_comm` and cancel the reindexing casts.
  rw [tensorPowAdd_comm L na nb, iso_trans_hom_val_app_apply, iso_trans_hom_val_app_apply,
    ÔåÉ sectionsCast_apply, sectionsCast_sectionsCast]
  exact Nat.add_comm nb na

/-- **Graded commutative semiring structure for an invertible line bundle**
(`lem:sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring`, [Stacks, Tag 01CV] commutative case): when `L` is invertible
(`IsInvertibleGr L`, [Stacks, Tag 01CR]), the section graded semiring `Ôèò_m ╬ô(X, L^{Ôèùm})` is *graded
commutative* ÔÇö `a ┬À b = b ┬À a` after the reindexing `i + j = j + i`.  Extends
`sectionGradedRing_gsemiring` with the single graded `mul_comm` clause, supplied by the iso-level
commutativity constraint `tensorPowAdd_comm` read off on sections (`sectionsMul_mul_comm`) and routed
through `gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`.  Invertibility is essential: for general `L` the section ring is
the free tensor algebra on `╬ô(X,L)`, which is non-commutative (see `sectionsMul_mul_comm`).
Project-local: Mathlib has no graded commutative semiring on sheaf-section tensor powers. -/
@[reducible] noncomputable def sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring (L : X.Modules) [IsInvertibleGr L] :
    DirectSum.GCommSemiring (sectionDeg L) :=
  { sectionGradedRing_gsemiring L with
    mul_comm := fun a b =>
      gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast L (add_comm a.1 b.1) (sectionsMul_mul_comm L a.2 b.2) }

/-- Sanity confirmation of the commutative deliverable: for invertible `L`, the section graded
commutative semiring assembles a genuine `CommSemiring` on `Ôèò_m ╬ô(X, L^{Ôèùm})` (the commutative
`╬ô_*(X,­Øôø)`), via `DirectSum.toCommSemiring`.  Stated as `Nonempty` (the carrier family depends on
`L`; sidesteps codegen on the noncomputable term). -/
theorem sectionGradedRing_commSemiring_nonempty (L : X.Modules) [IsInvertibleGr L] :
    Nonempty (CommSemiring (DirectSum Ôäò (sectionDeg L))) :=
  Ôş¿letI := sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring L; inferInstanceÔş®

/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement ÔÇö SNAP-S1 graded module `M(X,L,F)=Ôèò_m ╬ô(FÔèùL^{Ôèùm})` -/

/-- **SNAP-S1 module hexagon** (`lem:moduleTensorPowAdd_assoc`): the associativity coherence for the
graded-module structure `M(X,L,F)=Ôèò_m ╬ô(FÔèùL^{Ôèùm})`.  Project-local.  Genuine braided hexagon
(`╬▓_{L^i,F}` does not collapse since `F` need not be invertible). -/
private lemma moduleTensorPowAdd_assoc (F L : X.Modules) (i j k : Ôäò) :
    tensorObjWhiskerRightIso (tensorPowAdd L i j) (moduleTensorPow F L k) Ôë¬Ôë½
        moduleTensorPowAdd F L (i + j) k Ôë¬Ôë½
        eqToIso (congrArg (moduleTensorPow F L) (add_assoc i j k))
      = tensorObjAssoc (tensorPow L i) (tensorPow L j) (moduleTensorPow F L k) Ôë¬Ôë½
        tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso (tensorPow L i) (moduleTensorPowAdd F L j k) Ôë¬Ôë½
        moduleTensorPowAdd F L i (j + k) := by
  apply Iso.ext
  simp only [moduleTensorPowAdd, moduleTensorPow, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom, Iso.trans_inv,
    Iso.symm_inv,
    tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_eq, tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso_eq, tensorBraiding_eq, tensorObjAssoc,
    MonoidalCategory.whiskerRightIso_hom, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeftIso_hom,
    MonoidalCategory.whiskerRightIso_inv, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeftIso_inv,
    eqToIso.hom, Category.assoc, MonoidalCategory.comp_whiskerRight,
    MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_comp,
    Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_hom_inv_assoc,
    MonoidalCategory.hom_inv_whiskerRight_assoc]
  have hp := congrArg Iso.hom (tensorPowAdd_assoc L i j k)
  simp only [Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom, Iso.trans_inv, Iso.symm_inv,
    tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_eq, tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso_eq, tensorObjAssoc,
    MonoidalCategory.whiskerRightIso_hom, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeftIso_hom,
    MonoidalCategory.whiskerRightIso_inv, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeftIso_inv,
    eqToIso.hom, Category.assoc, MonoidalCategory.comp_whiskerRight,
    MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_comp, Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc,
    MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_hom_inv_assoc,
    MonoidalCategory.hom_inv_whiskerRight_assoc] at hp
  -- (1) slide ╬╝_{i,j} to the F-side; ╬▓_{L^{i+j},F} ÔåÆ ╬▓_{sheafTensorObj L^i L^j,F}
  rw [ÔåÉ MonoidalCategory.whisker_exchange_assoc,
    MonoidalCategory.associator_inv_naturality_left_assoc,
    ÔåÉ MonoidalCategory.comp_whiskerRight_assoc,
    BraidedCategory.braiding_naturality_left]
  rw [MonoidalCategory.comp_whiskerRight_assoc, MonoidalCategory.whisker_assoc_assoc]
  simp only [Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc]
  -- (2) inject pentagon under F Ôùü
  have hp' := (cancel_epi (((L.tensorPow i).sheafTensorObj (L.tensorPow j)).tensorObjIso
    (L.tensorPow k)).inv).mp hp
  have hgen : ÔêÇ {n1 n2 : Ôäò} (hn : n1 = n2),
      (F.tensorObjIso (L.tensorPow n1)).hom Ôë½
          eqToHom (congrArg (fun n => F.sheafTensorObj (L.tensorPow n)) hn)
        = F Ôùü eqToHom (congrArg (L.tensorPow) hn) Ôë½ (F.tensorObjIso (L.tensorPow n2)).hom := by
    rintro n1 n2 rfl; simp
  rw [hgen (add_assoc i j k), ÔåÉ MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_comp_assoc,
    ÔåÉ MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_comp_assoc, ÔåÉ MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_comp_assoc]
  simp only [Category.assoc]
  rw [hp']
  -- (3) ╬▓_{sheafTensorObj L^i L^j,F} ÔåÆ canonical ╬▓_{L^iÔèùL^j,F}, then split via hexagon_reverse
  simp only [MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_comp, Category.assoc]
  rw [ÔåÉ MonoidalCategory.associator_naturality_middle_assoc,
    ÔåÉ MonoidalCategory.comp_whiskerRight_assoc,
    ÔåÉ BraidedCategory.braiding_naturality_left, MonoidalCategory.comp_whiskerRight_assoc]
  have hhex : (╬▓_ (L.tensorPow i Ôèù L.tensorPow j) F).hom
      = (╬▒_ (L.tensorPow i) (L.tensorPow j) F).hom Ôë½
          (L.tensorPow i Ôùü (╬▓_ (L.tensorPow j) F).hom Ôë½
            (╬▒_ (L.tensorPow i) F (L.tensorPow j)).inv Ôë½ (╬▓_ (L.tensorPow i) F).hom ÔûÀ L.tensorPow j)
          Ôë½ (╬▒_ F (L.tensorPow i) (L.tensorPow j)).hom := by
    rw [ÔåÉ BraidedCategory.hexagon_reverse]
    simp
  rw [hhex]
  -- (4) Both legs differ from coherence by TWO interchanges of atoms on disjoint factors:
  --   (T1) the top swap of `T_{F,c}Ôü╗┬╣` (whiskerLeft on `FÔèùLßÁÅ`) with `T_{a,b}Ôü╗┬╣` (whiskerRight on
  --        `LÔü▒ÔèùL╩▓`), and (T2) `╬▓_a = ╬▓_{LÔü▒,F}` past the inner merge `T_{b,c} ; ╬╝_{j,k}`.
  --   `monoidal` does coherence but not interchange of two non-structural atoms, so we do both
  --   by hand (associator-naturality to expose the `(┬ÀÔèù┬À)Ôùü` form, then `whisker_exchange`),
  --   then `monoidal`.
  -- (T1) swap T_{F,c}Ôü╗┬╣ before T_{a,b}Ôü╗┬╣ on the RHS leg.
  rw [ÔåÉ MonoidalCategory.associator_naturality_right_assoc (L.tensorPow i) (L.tensorPow j)
        ((F.tensorObjIso (L.tensorPow k)).inv),
      ÔåÉ MonoidalCategory.whisker_exchange_assoc ((L.tensorPow i).tensorObjIso (L.tensorPow j)).inv
        ((F.tensorObjIso (L.tensorPow k)).inv)]
  -- (T2) reassociate `L^i Ôùü F Ôùü _` (RHS leg) into `(L^i Ôèù F) Ôùü _`, then slide ╬▓_a leftward past
  -- `╬╝_{j,k}` and `T_{b,c}` by interchange.
  rw [MonoidalCategory.associator_inv_naturality_right_assoc (L.tensorPow i) F
        (L.tensorPowAdd j k).hom,
      MonoidalCategory.associator_inv_naturality_right_assoc (L.tensorPow i) F
        ((L.tensorPow j).tensorObjIso (L.tensorPow k)).hom,
      MonoidalCategory.whisker_exchange_assoc (╬▓_ (L.tensorPow i) F).hom (L.tensorPowAdd j k).hom,
      MonoidalCategory.whisker_exchange_assoc (╬▓_ (L.tensorPow i) F).hom
        ((L.tensorPow j).tensorObjIso (L.tensorPow k)).hom]
  monoidal

private lemma moduleTensorPowAdd_zero_left (F L : X.Modules) (k : Ôäò) :
    moduleTensorPowAdd F L 0 k = tensorObjUnitIso (moduleTensorPow F L k) Ôë¬Ôë½
      eqToIso (congrArg (moduleTensorPow F L) (Nat.zero_add k).symm) := by
  apply Iso.ext
  simp only [moduleTensorPowAdd, moduleTensorPow, tensorPowAdd_zero_left, tensorPow_zero,
    tensorObjUnitIso_eq, tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_eq, tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso_eq, tensorBraiding_eq,
    tensorObjAssoc, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom, Iso.trans_inv, Iso.symm_inv,
    MonoidalCategory.whiskerRightIso_hom, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeftIso_hom,
    MonoidalCategory.whiskerRightIso_inv, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeftIso_inv,
    eqToIso.hom, Category.assoc, MonoidalCategory.comp_whiskerRight,
    MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_comp,
    Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc, MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_hom_inv_assoc,
    MonoidalCategory.hom_inv_whiskerRight_assoc]
  -- The reindexing slide for the `F Ôùü eqToHom`/`tensorObjIso` family (mirror of the (A)-hexagon
  -- `hgen`): fuse `F Ôùü eqToHom Ôë½ T'.hom` into `T.hom Ôë½ eqToHom`.
  have hgen : ÔêÇ {n1 n2 : Ôäò} (hn : n1 = n2),
      (F.tensorObjIso (L.tensorPow n1)).hom Ôë½
          eqToHom (congrArg (fun n => F.sheafTensorObj (L.tensorPow n)) hn)
        = F Ôùü eqToHom (congrArg (L.tensorPow) hn) Ôë½ (F.tensorObjIso (L.tensorPow n2)).hom := by
    rintro n1 n2 rfl; simp
  -- The middle unit-coherence square, stated over the canonical unit `­ØşÖ_` so that
  -- `braiding_tensorUnit_left` + `monoidal` fire (they special-case `­ØşÖ_`, not `unitModule X`); then
  -- transported to the `unitModule X` goal by defeq.
  have hmidÔéÇ : (╬▒_ (­ØşÖ_ X.Modules) F (L.tensorPow k)).inv Ôë½
        (╬▓_ (­ØşÖ_ X.Modules) F).hom ÔûÀ L.tensorPow k Ôë½
          (╬▒_ F (­ØşÖ_ X.Modules) (L.tensorPow k)).hom Ôë½ F Ôùü (╬╗_ (L.tensorPow k)).hom
      = (╬╗_ (F Ôèù L.tensorPow k)).hom := by
    rw [show (╬▓_ (­ØşÖ_ X.Modules) F).hom = (╬╗_ F).hom Ôë½ (¤ü_ F).inv from braiding_tensorUnit_left F]
    monoidal
  have hmid : (╬▒_ (unitModule X) F (L.tensorPow k)).inv Ôë½
        (╬▓_ (unitModule X) F).hom ÔûÀ L.tensorPow k Ôë½
          (╬▒_ F (unitModule X) (L.tensorPow k)).hom Ôë½ F Ôùü (╬╗_ (L.tensorPow k)).hom
      = (╬╗_ (F Ôèù L.tensorPow k)).hom := hmidÔéÇ
  -- Left-unitor naturality of `T.inv` ÔÇö stated over `­ØşÖ_` then transported to `unitModule X` by
  -- defeq (`leftUnitor_naturality` special-cases `­ØşÖ_`, so a positional `rw` on the `unitModule X`
  -- whisker fails to match).
  have hlunÔéÇ : (­ØşÖ_ X.Modules) Ôùü (F.tensorObjIso (L.tensorPow k)).inv Ôë½
        (╬╗_ (F Ôèù L.tensorPow k)).hom
      = (╬╗_ (F.sheafTensorObj (L.tensorPow k))).hom Ôë½ (F.tensorObjIso (L.tensorPow k)).inv :=
    MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor_naturality (F.tensorObjIso (L.tensorPow k)).inv
  have hlun : (unitModule X) Ôùü (F.tensorObjIso (L.tensorPow k)).inv Ôë½
        (╬╗_ (F Ôèù L.tensorPow k)).hom
      = (╬╗_ (F.sheafTensorObj (L.tensorPow k))).hom Ôë½ (F.tensorObjIso (L.tensorPow k)).inv := hlunÔéÇ
  rw [reassoc_of% hmid, reassoc_of% hlun, ÔåÉ hgen (Nat.zero_add k).symm, Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc]

/-! ### Graded-module carrier, transport and degreewise action (scaffolding for the `Gmodule`) -/

/-- The carrier type of the graded module at degree `m`: the `╬ô(X,­ØÆ¬_X)`-module of global sections of
`F Ôèù L^{Ôèùm}` (`def:sheafModuleTwist`).  Module analogue of `sectionDeg`. -/
abbrev moduleSectionDeg (F L : X.Modules) (m : Ôäò) : Type u :=
  ÔåÑ((moduleTensorPow F L m).val.obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ))

/-- Index-equality transport of module-section components, the module analogue of `sectionsCast`:
`╬ô(X,-)` applied to the canonical iso `FÔèùL^{Ôèùi} Ôëà FÔèùL^{Ôèùj}` from `h : i = j`. -/
noncomputable def moduleSectionsCast (F L : X.Modules) {i j : Ôäò} (h : i = j) :
    moduleSectionDeg F L i ÔëâÔéù[ÔåÑ(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ))] moduleSectionDeg F L j :=
  ((toPresheafOfModules X ÔïÖ PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj
    (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).mapIso (eqToIso (congrArg (moduleTensorPow F L) h))).toLinearEquiv

/-- Transport along `rfl` is the identity (module analogue of `sectionsCast_refl`). -/
@[simp] lemma moduleSectionsCast_refl (F L : X.Modules) (i : Ôäò) :
    moduleSectionsCast F L (rfl : i = i) = LinearEquiv.refl _ (moduleSectionDeg F L i) := by
  ext x
  rfl

/-- Cast-mediated equality in the module graded sigma type (module analogue of
`gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`). -/
lemma moduleGradedMonoid_eq_of_cast (F L : X.Modules)
    {a b : GradedMonoid (moduleSectionDeg F L)}
    (h : a.1 = b.1) (h2 : moduleSectionsCast F L h a.2 = b.2) : a = b := by
  obtain Ôş¿i, xÔş® := a
  obtain Ôş¿j, yÔş® := b
  obtain rfl : i = j := h
  simp only [moduleSectionsCast_refl, LinearEquiv.refl_apply] at h2
  subst h2
  rfl

/-- Degreewise graded action `sectionDeg L i ├ù moduleSectionDeg F L j ÔåÆ moduleSectionDeg F L (i+j)`,
the section multiplication followed by global sections of the action comparison `a_{i,j}`
(`def:moduleTensorPowAdd`).  Module analogue of the `GradedMonoid.GMul` instance on `sectionDeg`. -/
noncomputable instance (F L : X.Modules) :
    GradedMonoid.GSMul (sectionDeg L) (moduleSectionDeg F L) where
  smul {i j} (r : sectionDeg L i) (x : moduleSectionDeg F L j) :=
    ((moduleTensorPowAdd F L i j).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom
      ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L i) (moduleTensorPow F L j)).hom
        (r ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] x))

/-- Definitional unfolding of the graded action, as a rewrite handle for the coherence proofs. -/
private lemma gSMul_smul_apply (F L : X.Modules) {i j : Ôäò}
    (r : sectionDeg L i) (x : moduleSectionDeg F L j) :
    (GradedMonoid.GSMul.smul r x : moduleSectionDeg F L (i + j))
      = ((moduleTensorPowAdd F L i j).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom
          ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L i) (moduleTensorPow F L j)).hom
            (r ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] x)) :=
  rfl

/-- Definitional unfolding of the module section transport applied to an element. -/
private lemma moduleSectionsCast_apply (F L : X.Modules) {i j : Ôäò} (h : i = j)
    (y : moduleSectionDeg F L i) :
    moduleSectionsCast F L h y
      = ((eqToIso (congrArg (moduleTensorPow F L) h)).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom y :=
  rfl

/-- Two index transports along inverse equalities cancel (module analogue). -/
private lemma moduleSectionsCast_sectionsCast (F L : X.Modules) {i j : Ôäò} (hÔéü : i = j) (hÔéé : j = i)
    (x : moduleSectionDeg F L i) :
    moduleSectionsCast F L hÔéé (moduleSectionsCast F L hÔéü x) = x := by
  obtain rfl := hÔéü
  rw [Subsingleton.elim hÔéé rfl]
  simp only [moduleSectionsCast_refl, LinearEquiv.refl_apply]

set_option maxRecDepth 4000 in
/-- **Compatibility of the graded module action** (`lem:moduleSectionAction_coherent`, compatibility
clause): transporting `(r┬Àr')Ôïåx` along `(i+j)+k = i+(j+k)` gives `rÔïå(r'Ôïåx)`.  Module analogue of
`sectionsMul_mul_assoc` (B7): the same three-slide assembly with the action comparison `a` replacing
the ring comparison `╬╝` on the legs touching `F`, closed by the iso-level hexagon
`moduleTensorPowAdd_assoc` (A). -/
theorem moduleSectionAction_mul_smul (F L : X.Modules) {i j k : Ôäò}
    (r : sectionDeg L i) (r' : sectionDeg L j) (x : moduleSectionDeg F L k) :
    moduleSectionsCast F L (add_assoc i j k)
        (GradedMonoid.GSMul.smul (GradedMonoid.GMul.mul r r') x)
      = GradedMonoid.GSMul.smul r (GradedMonoid.GSMul.smul r' x) := by
  -- Unfold the degreewise action/multiplication on both sides to `╬ô(comparison) Ôêİ sectionsMul`;
  -- normalize the `+ßÁÑ` (graded-action degree) to `+`.
  simp only [vadd_eq_add, gSMul_smul_apply, gMul_mul_apply]
  --   RIGHT slide (e = ╬╝_{i,j}): move the inner `╬ô(╬╝_{i,j})` out of the first factor of the outer
  --   `sectionsMul (L^{i+j}) (FÔèùL^k)`.
  rw [sectionsMul_whiskerRight_natural (tensorPowAdd L i j) (moduleTensorPow F L k)
        ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L i) (tensorPow L j)).hom
          (r ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] r')) x]
  --   LEFT slide (e = a_{j,k}): move the inner `╬ô(a_{j,k})` out of the second factor of the outer
  --   `sectionsMul (L^i) (FÔèùL^{j+k})`.
  rw [sectionsMul_whiskerLeft_natural (tensorPow L i) (moduleTensorPowAdd F L j k) r
        ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L j) (moduleTensorPow F L k)).hom
          (r' ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] x))]
  --   B5 backwards: recognise the RHS iterated section product as `╬ô(╬▒)(ÔÇĞ)`.
  rw [ÔåÉ tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul (tensorPow L i) (tensorPow L j) (moduleTensorPow F L k)
        r r' x]
  --   (A) the iso-level module hexagon applied at the common base element.
  exact congrArg
    (fun (iso : sheafTensorObj (sheafTensorObj (tensorPow L i) (tensorPow L j)) (moduleTensorPow F L k)
        Ôëà moduleTensorPow F L (i + (j + k))) =>
      (iso.hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom
        ((sectionsMul (sheafTensorObj (tensorPow L i) (tensorPow L j)) (moduleTensorPow F L k)).hom
          ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L i) (tensorPow L j)).hom
              (r ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] r')
            ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] x)))
    (moduleTensorPowAdd_assoc F L i j k)

set_option maxRecDepth 4000 in
/-- **Unitality of the graded module action** (`lem:moduleSectionAction_coherent`, unitality
clause): transporting `1 Ôïå x` along `0 + k = k` gives `x`.  Module analogue of
`sectionsMul_one_mul`: the
degree-`(0,k)` action comparison `a_{0,k}` is the left unitor (`moduleTensorPowAdd_zero_left`), and
the inner cast pairs with the outer `moduleSectionsCast` and cancels, leaving the left-unit law
`tensorObjUnitIso_hom_sectionsMul`. -/
theorem moduleSectionAction_one_smul (F L : X.Modules) {k : Ôäò} (x : moduleSectionDeg F L k) :
    moduleSectionsCast F L (zero_add k)
        (GradedMonoid.GSMul.smul (1 : sectionDeg L 0) x) = x := by
  -- NOTE: the graded unit is spelled `(1 : sectionDeg L 0)` rather than `GradedMonoid.GOne.one`
  -- (defeq by `gOne_one_eq`): the bare `GradedMonoid.GOne.one` projection as an argument to the
  -- `+ßÁÑ`-graded `GSMul.smul` triggers a whnf blow-up during *statement* elaboration.
  rw [gSMul_smul_apply, moduleTensorPowAdd_zero_left F L k]
  -- `moduleTensorPowAdd L 0 k = tensorObjUnitIso Ôë¬Ôë½ eqToIso`; the inner cast pairs with the outer
  -- `moduleSectionsCast` and the two cancel, leaving the left unitor.
  change moduleSectionsCast F L (zero_add k) (moduleSectionsCast F L (Nat.zero_add k).symm
      (((tensorObjUnitIso (moduleTensorPow F L k)).hom.val.app (Opposite.op Ôèñ)).hom
        ((sectionsMul (tensorPow L 0) (moduleTensorPow F L k)).hom
          ((1 : ÔåÑ(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)))
            ÔèùÔé£[(X.sheaf.obj ÔïÖ forgetÔéé CommRingCat RingCat).obj (Opposite.op Ôèñ)] x)))) = x
  rw [moduleSectionsCast_sectionsCast]
  exact tensorObjUnitIso_hom_sectionsMul (moduleTensorPow F L k) x

set_option maxRecDepth 4000 in
/-- **Graded-module structure on the twisted section components**
(`lem:sectionGradedModule_gmodule`,
module analogue of [Stacks, Tag 01CV]): for an *arbitrary* `L : X.Modules` and any `F : X.Modules`,
the family `m ÔåĞ ╬ô(X, F Ôèù L^{Ôèùm})` is a `DirectSum.Gmodule` over the section graded monoid
`m ÔåĞ ╬ô(X, L^{Ôèùm})`, so `Ôèò_m ╬ô(X, F Ôèù L^{Ôèùm})` is a graded module over `╬ô_*(X, L)`.  The degreewise
action `╬ô(a_{i,j}) Ôêİ sectionsMul` (the `GSMul` instance) satisfies the two `GMulAction` coherence
clauses `moduleSectionAction_one_smul` / `moduleSectionAction_mul_smul` (routed, like the ring's
`sectionGradedRing_gmonoid`, through `moduleGradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`), and the bilinearity clauses
hold because `╬ô(a_{i,j}) Ôêİ sectionsMul` is a composite of additive maps (push `0`/`+` through the
`TensorProduct` step then the two `ModuleCat` morphisms ÔÇö `erw` to cross the `DFunLike` coercion).
Project-local: Mathlib has no graded module on sheaf-section twists. -/
@[reducible] noncomputable def sectionGradedModule_gmodule (F L : X.Modules) :
    letI := sectionGradedRing_gmonoid L
    DirectSum.Gmodule (sectionDeg L) (moduleSectionDeg F L) :=
  letI := sectionGradedRing_gmonoid L
  { (inferInstance : GradedMonoid.GSMul (sectionDeg L) (moduleSectionDeg F L)) with
    one_smul := fun b =>
      moduleGradedMonoid_eq_of_cast F L (zero_add b.1) (moduleSectionAction_one_smul F L b.2)
    mul_smul := fun a a' b =>
      moduleGradedMonoid_eq_of_cast F L (add_assoc a.1 a'.1 b.1)
        (moduleSectionAction_mul_smul F L a.2 a'.2 b.2)
    smul_add := fun a b c => by
      simp only [gSMul_smul_apply]; erw [TensorProduct.tmul_add, map_add, map_add]
    smul_zero := fun a => by
      simp only [gSMul_smul_apply]; erw [TensorProduct.tmul_zero, map_zero, map_zero]
    add_smul := fun a a' b => by
      simp only [gSMul_smul_apply]; erw [TensorProduct.add_tmul, map_add, map_add]
    zero_smul := fun b => by
      simp only [gSMul_smul_apply]; erw [TensorProduct.zero_tmul, map_zero, map_zero] }

end AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules
